title: Intensely Umami Malaysian Chicken Biryani
description: A rich and flavorful Malaysian dish featuring basmati rice and chicken in a savory umami sauce, perfect for a lazy Sunday
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the mushroom broth, soy sauce, and curry powder, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the basmati rice to the saucepan and stir to combine with the chicken and sauce.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
